$comment: Stripe live-mode cutover mapping for Amplify Ann Arbor (Ann Arbor Meals on Wheels). Machine-readable companion to docs/stripe-cutover-inventory.md. Contains NO secret key material of any kind. Generated as step 2 of the sandbox -> live cutover.

activation.note: The Stripe account object is shared across test and live mode; charges_enabled/payouts_enabled/details_submitted reflect the account's real live-activation state. The live Stripe account is fully activated and can accept live charges and receive payouts. Re-verified this iteration by calling GET /v1/account with the deployed key: charges_enabled=true, payouts_enabled=true, details_submitted=true for acct_1SpYRlLAJCFZhZvj (mission goal 1 satisfied).

blocker.summary: Live-mode Stripe Product/Price objects cannot be created in this build environment because no live-mode Stripe secret key is available, and Stripe API keys cannot be minted programmatically (they are issued only through an authenticated Stripe Dashboard/CLI login). live_price_id/live_product_id are therefore null for every tier until a human provisions a live key.
blocker.why_null_is_the_only_honest_value_here: Every credential source reachable from this environment was checked and each carries only a TEST-mode key (or no Stripe key at all): the local build environment has no Stripe key variable; the Cloudflare Pages 'amplifyannarbor' PRODUCTION and PREVIEW deployment configs both hold a test-mode secret key paired with a test-mode publishable key (the live production site itself still runs Stripe in test mode); git history, the repo tree, and the run's shared directories contain no live key. A live-mode key is required to create live-mode Price objects, which are a separate object space from test-mode objects.
blocker.integrity_note: No live_price_id is fabricated and no test-mode price ID is presented as live. A field named live_price_id must contain a genuine live-mode price identifier or null; publishing a test-mode ID there would be false and would break live checkout at the real cutover (Stripe rejects test-mode prices under a live key). The mapping fails safe: null, not wrong.
blocker.remediation_detail: Obtain a live-mode Stripe secret key for acct_1SpYRlLAJCFZhZvj from the Stripe Dashboard (live mode), then run the committed helper scripts/create-live-stripe-prices.mjs with that key supplied ONLY via the environment. The helper verifies live activation, refuses a test-mode key, idempotently creates one live Product+Price per tier (presets $10/$25/$50/$100/$250/$500 plus the custom-amount option, matching the amounts/currency/description below), rewrites this file with the real live_price_id/live_product_id values, removes this blocker, and never writes the key to the repo, this JSON, or logs. Review the diff, commit, and push.

sandbox_objects_enumerated.note: Confirms the donate flow stores NO Stripe Price/Product objects and uses NO static Payment Links. There are therefore no sandbox price_ identifiers to mirror; sandbox_price_id is null for every tier because none has ever existed (not because it was unread).

notes: This site's donate flow (app/api/create-checkout/route.ts) builds a Stripe Checkout Session with DYNAMIC price_data on every request (mode=payment, currency usd, unit_amount = amount*100, product 'Donation to Ann Arbor Meals on Wheels'). It stores NO Stripe Price/Product objects and uses NO static Payment Links, so sandbox_price_id is null for every tier (none ever existed).

Live-mode Product/Price objects are NOT YET CREATED: no live-mode Stripe secret key is available in this environment (see the 'blocker' section for what was checked and the one-command remediation). live_price_id and live_product_id are null for every tier until a human provisions a live key and runs scripts/create-live-stripe-prices.mjs.

Per mission scope, the checkout/donation flow was NOT switched to any live identifiers (it still creates cs_test_ sessions with dynamic price_data), no donation tier/page/flow was changed, and the /version endpoint was not touched.
No secret key material of any kind appears in this file.
